units.source_text: 利息收益以淨額列報，因為主要經營決策者主要依賴淨額作為業績表現衡量指標。於適⽤情況下，呈列的收益及⽀出⾦額包括分部之間調配資⾦的
units.translation_target_text: Interest income is presented on a net basis because the chief operating decision maker relies primarily on net as a performance measure. Where applicable, the amounts of revenue and expenses presented include the allocation of funds between segments.
units.translation_en: Interest income is presented on a net basis because the chief operating decision maker relies primarily on net as a performance measure. Where applicable, the amounts of revenue and expenses presented include the allocation of funds between segments.

layout_variants.display_en: Interest income is presented on a net basis because the chief operating decision maker relies primarily on net as a performance measure. Where applicable, the amounts of revenue and expenses presented include the allocation of funds between segments.

units.source_text: 結果，以及各公司之間和各業務部⾨之間相互交易的結果。該等交易全部按公平原則進⾏。分部資產、負債、收益及⽀出根據集團會計政策計量。
units.translation_target_text: results, and the results of transactions between companies and business units. All such transactions were conducted on an arm's length basis. Segment assets, liabilities, income and expenses are measured in accordance with the Group's accounting policies.

units.source_text: 共同成本按實際分攤⾦額計入各個分部。業務分部的集團內部撇銷項⽬於「企業中⼼」呈列。
units.translation_target_text: Common costs are included in each segment based on the actual allocated amount. Intra-group write-offs by business segments are presented in Corporate Centre.

units.source_text: 繼2024年10⽉公布架構重組後，⾃2025年1⽉1⽇起，集團於IFRS 8「營業分部」下的可呈報分部由四個業務分部以及企業中⼼組成。此等可呈報
units.translation_target_text: Following the structural reorganization announced in October 2024, starting from January 1, 2025, the group's reportable segments under IFRS 8 "Business Segments" consist of four business segments and the corporate center. Reportable
units.translation_en: Following the structural reorganization announced in October 2024, starting from January 1, 2025, the group's reportable segments under IFRS 8 "Business Segments" consist of four business segments and the corporate center. Reportable

units.source_text: 分部取代截⾄2024年12⽉31⽇的過往報告營業分部。所有分部可比較數據已經重列，以反映集團經修訂的分部架構。
units.translation_target_text: Segment replaces the historically reported operating segments as of December 31, 2024. All segment comparables have been restated to reflect the Group's revised segment structure.
units.translation_en: Segment replaces the historically reported operating segments as of December 31, 2024. All segment comparables have been restated to reflect the Group's revised segment structure.

units.source_text: 香港：香港業務包括香港滙豐及恒⽣銀⾏的零售銀⾏業務、財富管理及⼯商⾦融業務。
units.translation_target_text: Hong Kong: Hong Kong business includes retail banking, wealth management and industrial and commercial banking services of HSBC Hong Kong and Hang Seng Bank.

units.source_text: 英國：英國業務包括英國個⼈銀⾏業務（包括first direct和M&S Bank）及英國⼯商⾦融業務（包括HSBC Innovation Bank）。
units.translation_target_text: UK: UK business includes UK personal banking business (including first direct and M&S Bank) and UK industrial and commercial financial business (including HSBC Innovation Bank).

units.translation_target_text: Corporate and institutional financial management: The corporate and institutional financial management business integrates industrial and commercial financial services outside the UK and Hong Kong and global banking and capital markets businesses.

units.source_text: 1 包括集團在交通銀⾏的持股被攤薄所導致的11億美元虧損（包括儲備撥回）。詳情參閱第319⾄322⾴附註18。
units.translation_target_text: 1 Including a US$1.1 billion loss (including write-back of reserves) resulting from the dilution of the Group’s shareholding in Bank of Communications. Please refer to note 18 on pages 319 to 322 for details.
units.translation_en: 1 Including a US$1.1 billion loss (including write-back of reserves) resulting from the dilution of the Group’s shareholding in Bank of Communications. Please refer to note 18 on pages 319 to 322 for details.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 Including a US$1.1 billion loss (including write-back of reserves) resulting from the dilution of the Group’s shareholding in Bank of Communications. Please refer to note 18 on pages 319 to 322 for details.

units.source_text: 2 包括企業中⼼之利息⽀出97億美元（2024年：114億美元；2023年：87億美元），是提供資⾦予資本市場財資業務的內部成本。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Includes Corporate Center interest expense of US$9.7 billion (2024: US$11.4 billion; 2023: US$8.7 billion), which represents the internal cost of funding the capital markets treasury business.
units.translation_en: 2 Includes Corporate Center interest expense of US$9.7 billion (2024: US$11.4 billion; 2023: US$8.7 billion), which represents the internal cost of funding the capital markets treasury business.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Includes Corporate Center interest expense of US$9.7 billion (2024: US$11.4 billion; 2023: US$8.7 billion), which represents the internal cost of funding the capital markets treasury business.

units.source_text: 3 包括就集團於交通銀⾏的投資確認的10億美元減值虧損。詳情參閱第319⾄322⾴附註18。
units.translation_target_text: 3 Includes an impairment loss of US$1 billion recognized on the Group's investment in Bank of Communications. Please refer to note 18 on pages 319 to 322 for details.
units.translation_en: 3 Includes an impairment loss of US$1 billion recognized on the Group's investment in Bank of Communications. Please refer to note 18 on pages 319 to 322 for details.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 3 Includes an impairment loss of US$1 billion recognized on the Group's investment in Bank of Communications. Please refer to note 18 on pages 319 to 322 for details.

units.source_text: 4 包括就集團於交通銀⾏的投資確認的30億美元減值虧損。
units.translation_target_text: 4 Includes an impairment loss of US$3 billion recognized on the Group's investment in Bank of Communications.
units.translation_en: 4 Includes an impairment loss of US$3 billion recognized on the Group's investment in Bank of Communications.
